description: You are a fleet performance analyst for Pacific Horizon Shipping. Using the voyage records and vessel registry in ~/Documents/Spreadsheets/maritime_fleet_data.xlsx, create a fleet performance analysis workbook. The analysis must include per-voyage IMO Energy Efficiency Operational Indicator (EEOI = Fuel_MT * 3.114 * 1,000,000 / (Cargo_MT * Distance_nm)) in g CO2/tonne-mile, fuel efficiency metrics (MT fuel per nautical mile), and total fleet CO2 emissions (Fuel * 3.114). Identify the three worst-performing vessels by average EEOI and quantify the impact of weather conditions on fuel efficiency. Include a fleet summary dashboard and save the final report to ~/Documents/Spreadsheets/fleet_performance_report.xlsx.
